## Checklist

- [ ] Content is technically accurate.
- [ ] Content follows the existing TypeScript data types.
- [ ] I checked for duplicate or near-duplicate content.
- [ ] Explanations are beginner-friendly and interview-relevant.
- [ ] JavaScript templates include alternate accepted answers where useful.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm lint`.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm typecheck`.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm test`.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm build`.
